name: InsightFace (Face Analysis Library)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT for academic; commercial use requires separate license); DeepInsight / Jia Guo

auth.notes: Local library; models downloaded from model_zoo or CDN

performance.notes: ONNX/CUDA backend; real-time face analysis on GPU

agent_readiness.notes: State-of-the-art face analysis: detection, recognition, landmark, attribute. import insightface. from insightface.app import FaceAnalysis. app = FaceAnalysis(providers=['CUDAExecutionProvider', 'CPUExecutionProvider']). app.prepare(ctx_id=0, det_size=(640, 640)). faces = app.get(img). for face in faces: bbox = face.bbox; kps = face.kps; det_score = face.det_score; embedding = face.embedding; gender = face.gender; age = face.age. Face swap: from insightface.model_zoo import get_model. swapper = get_model('inswapper_128.onnx'). swapper.get(img, face, target_face, paste_back=True). ArcFace embeddings. Buffalo_l model pack (best accuracy). SCRFD detection.

gotchas: Non-commercial license for most models — academic/research only without license
Face swap feature has ethical implications — responsible use required
Model download requires specific paths — model_zoo setup needed
No type annotations — poor IDE support
best_when: Face detection, recognition, and attribute analysis (age, gender)
Face comparison and identification for authorized systems
When ArcFace-quality embeddings are needed for face recognition pipelines
avoid_when: When MediaPipe Face Mesh is sufficient for landmark detection
summary: InsightFace provides face analysis: detection (SCRFD), recognition (ArcFace), landmarks, age/gender. FaceAnalysis().get(img) → faces with bbox, embedding, gender, age, kps. ArcFace embeddings for recognition. ONNX/CUDA backend. MIT for academic use by DeepInsight. Best for face recognition pipelines requiring ArcFace accuracy. Non-commercial license. No type annotations. GPU needed for real-time. Face swap raises ethical concerns.
